narrative:
Twinsburg 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 901 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
